body_excerpt: {"credits": [], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-45192", "cvss": {"score": 6.5, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:L/UI:N/S:U/C:H/I:N/A:N"}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 6.5, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:L/UI:N/S:U/C:H/I:N/A:N"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-200", "name": "Exposure of Sensitive Information to an Unauthorized Actor"}], "description": "A bug in the GET `/api/v2/connections/{connection_id}` REST API endpoint in Apache Airflow allowed an authenticated UI/API user with Connection-read permission to retrieve secrets stored in a Connection's `extra` JSON blob under field names not present in the redaction allowlist (`DEFAULT_SENSITIVE_FIELDS`) — for example, official Slack-provider credential field names were returned in plaintext. Affects deployments that store credentials in Connection `extra` blobs and grant Connection-read access to multiple users. Users are advised to upgrade to `apache-airflow` 3.2.2 or later. As a defense-in-depth mitigation, deployment operators can store sensitive credential values in a secret-backend rather than inlined into the Connection's `extra` field.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.0041, "percentile": 0.32568}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-2883-wwh7-x57v", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-07-07T23:47:11Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-2883-wwh7-x57v", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-2883-wwh7-x57v"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-45192"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-06-01T08:16:20Z", "published_at": "2026-06-01T09:31:12Z", "references": ["https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-45192", "https://github.com/apache/airflow/pull/66673", "https://lists.apache.org/thread/r2q93dg2wp5h9sd9vh6y4y5ljqd9crdd", "http://www.openwall.com/lists/oss-security/2026/06/01/3", "https://github.com/pypa/advisory-database/tree/main/vulns/apache-airflow/PYSEC-2026-173.yaml", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-2883-wwh7-x57v"], "repository_advisory_url": null, "severity": "medium", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/apache/airflow", "summary": "Apache Airflow: Incomplete redaction allowlist exposes secrets in Connection `extra`  to read-permitted users", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-07-07T23:47:11Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-2883-wwh7-x57v", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "3.2.2", "package": {"ecosystem": "pip", "name": "apache-airflow"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 3.2.2"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: Apache Airflow: Incomplete redaction allowlist exposes secrets in Connection `extra`  to read-permitted users
